# WP4 fixture: guaranteed build-slot card must stay selectable
# Scenario: injected guaranteed Echo is never frozen; autopilot selects the
# best legal non-guaranteed pick when a valuable board exists.

@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 canBanish=1 pickIsAcceptable=1
1:901:160
2:902:130:guaranteed
3:903:20:avoided

@expect action=SELECT target=1 boardState=OPEN

# Guaranteed card is selectable when it is the only legal sub-threshold pick
@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 canBanish=1 pickIsAcceptable=1
1:911:45:guaranteed
2:912:30:avoided
3:913:25:avoided

@expect action=SELECT target=1 boardState=OPEN

# Guaranteed card must not block reroll when every pick is unacceptable
@board threshold=120 freezeResources=2 canReroll=1 canBanish=1 pickIsAcceptable=0
1:921:10:guaranteed:avoided
2:922:5:avoided

@expect action=reroll target=- boardState=OPEN
